# dedalus_workspace (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "dedalus_workspace" "example_workspace" {
  workspace_id = "workspace_id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `workspace_id` (String)

### Optional

- `timeouts` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `desired_state` (String) Available values: "active", "inactive", "destroyed".
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `memory_mib` (Number) Memory in MiB.
- `status` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--status))
- `storage_gib` (Number)
- `vcpu` (Number) CPU in vCPUs.

<a id="nestedatt--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `read` (String) The timeout for the operation, default: 600 seconds


<a id="nestedatt--status"></a>
### Nested Schema for `status`

Read-Only:

- `last_error` (String)
- `last_progress_at` (String)
- `last_transition_at` (String)
- `phase` (String) Available values: "accepted", "placement_pending", "starting", "running", "stopping", "sleeping", "destroying", "destroyed", "failed".
- `reason` (String)
- `retryable` (Boolean)
- `revision` (String)
